name: Volatus Capital Corp.
summary: Volatus Capital Corp. engages in the acquisition and exploration of mineral property assets in Canada. It holds 100% interest in various mineral properties located in the Toodoggone mining camp in north-western British Columbia; 51% undivided interest in the Sunset Copper Star Project situated in the Nanaimo Mining Division, British Columbia; and interest in the Split Dome copper project located near Hazelton, British Columbia. The company was incorporated in 2018 and is based in Vancouver, Canada.
